texto: People who make use of all their senses in trying times are no less patriotic than those whose restraint is lost, whose senses are dimmed and whose brains are washed. This is also the time for the patriot to say: Enough.
explicacao: Citação de Gideon Levy sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “People who make use of all their senses in trying times are no less patriotic than those whose re…” articula reflexao, patriotism, whose em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e reflexao.
